gnomad.note: absent from gnomAD v4; canonical splice acceptor position

insilico.note: approximate; SpliceAI strongly predicts acceptor loss at canonical -2 position

literature.title: Aberrant splicing of BRCA2 due to canonical splice-site mutations.
literature.abstract: Patient RNA studies of BRCA2 c.7008-2A>C demonstrate exon 14 skipping and out-of-frame transcript, consistent with loss of function.

_ground_truth.note: Canonical -2 splice acceptor in a LoF-mechanism gene; strict_rule applies PVS1 + PM2 -> LP/P, others should converge but rationale differs
